title: Tuzla, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tuzla, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tuzla is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 110,000. A city in northeastern Bosnia known for its salt lakes, the Pannonian Lakes complex, and its diverse industrial and cultural heritage.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
